nodes.name: Boran cisticola
nodes.summary: Boran cisticola（Cisticola bodessa）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Boran cisticola。

nodes.name: Boran cisticola
nodes.summary: The Boran cisticola (Cisticola bodessa) is a species of bird in the family Cisticolidae. It is found in Ethiopia, Kenya and Uganda. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical dry forest, dry savanna, and subtropical or tropical dry shrubland. References
nodes.shortSummary: The Boran cisticola (Cisticola bodessa) is a species of bird in the family Cisticolidae. It is found in Ethiopia, Kenya and Uganda.

nodes.name: Cisticola
nodes.summary: Cisticola（Cisticola）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联53种鸟类，如Whistling cisticola、Chattering cisticola、Trilling cisticola等53种鸟类。
